calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Linda Forster, #13286, (925)548-1420.

Gayane Zorabian, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Porsche Financial Services, Inc.,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Aaron Shear, an individual,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $72,099.77
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $6,569.07
Attorney's Fees: $3,800.00
Costs: $699.75
Total Judgment in the amount of $83,168.59
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Aug-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
